title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A TEN-BED MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN VICENTE, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, TO BE KNOWN AS THE SAN VICENTE MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 88

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7856, December 31, 1994 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A TEN-BED MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN VICENTE, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, TO BE KNOWN AS THE SAN VICENTE MUNICIPAL HOSPITAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established a ten-bed municipal hospital in the Municipality of San Vicente, Province of Palawan, to be known as the San Vicente Municipal Hospital.

SEC. 2. The Department of Health in consultation and coordination with local government officials concerned, shall promulgate the necessary rules and regulations for the effective implementation of the Act.

SEC. 3. The amount necessary for the establishment of the hospital shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law; thereafter, funds necessary for its maintenance and operation shall be provided in accordance with the provisions of the Local Government Code.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

EDGARDO J. ANGARA

(Sgd.)

JOSE DE VENECIA, JR.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on November 17, 1994 and October 20, 1994, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EDGARDO E. TUMANGAN

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved, 31 December 1994

(Sgd.)

FIDEL V. RAMOS

President of the Philippines
